title: Pricing & accounts (early access)
body: Flat, node-gated pricing went up — Sovereign (free) through Enterprise — alongside early-access account onboarding with Google, GitHub, Microsoft, and Apple sign-in.

title: The Atmosphere — public preview
body: The first public look at sovereign, local-first AI infrastructure: the globe, the dive into a node, the honest status board, and a two-command install.

title: Honest status board
body: Every capability labelled Live, Wired, Standalone, or Mock — and it updates here the moment something ships. No vaporware.
